t2i-kamui-fal-openai-gpt-image-2.description: OpenAI GPT Image 2 Text-to-Image (fal openai/gpt-image-2) - Next-gen image model (alpha), flexible resolution up to ~4K. prompt (required); image_size presets square_hd, square, portrait_4_3, portrait_16_9, landscape_4_3, landscape_16_9 (default landscape_4_3) or image_width+image_height; quality low, medium, high (default high); num_images (default 1); output_format jpeg, png, webp (default png); sync_mode; optional openai_api_key (BYOK). Returns Fal queue JSON via Kamui Code ⭐⭐⭐
